ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Apr-27-2015 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Mar-09-2015 Continued To Apr-27-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Haideen Anderson in Propria Persona.

Ms. Anderson reported that the petition is not quite finished, that she has been speaking with the relatives, that she has been gathering receipts and requested a 3 week continuance. The court stated that it wanted to make sure she had enough time to finish and file the petition. The status on filing a petition for final distribution was continued to April 27, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jan-26-2015 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Jan-26-2015 Continued To Mar-09-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Haideen Anderson in Propria Persona.

Ms. Anderson asked the court for guidance as to how to distribute the decedent's father's share of the estate as he is deceased, asked if she is allowed to pay herself for administration fees and stated that she paid estate taxes. The court provided Ms. Anderson a list of probate paralegals and directed her to obtain assistance/guidance. The status on filing a petition for final distribution or petition for approval of status report was continued to March 9, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Wan. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing Of The Estate
Off Calendar Nov-24-2014 Continued To Jan-26-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Nov-24-2014 Continued To Jan-26-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing Of The Estate
Off Calendar Sep-15-2014 Continued To Nov-24-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Haideen Anderson in Propria Persona.

Ms. Anderson stated that the law suit in New York finally settled but that the check has not come in yet. The Court informed Ms. Anderson that she needs to file an Inventory and Appraisal, that she can not distribute any of the funds without a Court order, that she needs to give notice to the Franchise Tax Board and that she has to file a petition for Final Distribution. The Court also encouraged Ms. Anderson to seek assistance. Status on closing of the Estate and status on filing of petition for final distribution were continued to November 24, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Sep-15-2014 Continued To Nov-24-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing Of The Estate
Off Calendar Aug-18-2014 Continued To Sep-15-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Aug-18-2014 Continued To Sep-15-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jun-23-2014 Continued To Aug-18-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Haideen Anderson in Propria Persona.

Ms. Anderson stated that there has been little movement in the New York litigation case, that the matter has settled, that she has not received the settlement money and that she expects to receive it in August. The Court informed Ms. Anderson that if the money comes into the Estate that she must have an inventory and appraisal, that she must have a petition for approval of distribution of the money, that she must notify the Franchise Tax Board and strongly recommended that she obtain legal advise. Status on closing of the Estate and petition for final distribution or petition for approval of status report were continued to August 18, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Jun-23-2014 Continued To Aug-18-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing Of The Estate
Off Calendar Dec-16-2013 Continued To Jun-23-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Haideen Anderson in Propria Persona.

Ms. Anderson requested a continuance stating that the pending law suit in New York is still not settled, that they had little movement and that the City of New York made an offer to many of the Plaintiffs but that it is not final. Status on filing of the petition for final distribution or petition for approval of status report was continued to June 23, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Chien. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jul-22-2013 Continued To Dec-09-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court will issue an order to file a Petition for Final Distribution or a Petition for Approval of Status Report. Status on closing of the estate was continued to December 9, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/J. Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera. (Not Reported)
